response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Discovered substantial discrepancies in the reference JSON's metadata. The performers in the first song are Nekomata Okayu and AZKi (not Hoshimachi Suisei), and the performers in the second song are Nekomata Okayu, Himemori Luna, and Tsunomaki Watame (not Usada Pekora). 2. JSON Usage: The reference lyrics were entirely missing/placeholders, so I executed 100% manual transcription and translation, cross-referencing on-screen Japanese lyrics for spelling accuracy. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed visuals precisely, including an on-screen visual title card exception for 'Ai♡Scream!', and structured rapid-fire vocal transitions cleanly to avoid overlapping.

subtitles.original: 消耗戦に持ち込んで
subtitles.english: Dragging it out into a war of attrition,

subtitles.original: お互いに足を引っ張り合う
subtitles.english: we drag each other down.

subtitles.original: 沈殿した思い出で ずっといっしょ
subtitles.english: With our settled memories, we'll be together forever.

subtitles.original: 参観日にだって 誰からも見られていない気がしたんだ
subtitles.english: Even on parent-teacher day, I felt like nobody was looking at me.

subtitles.original: 散々死に買って 自分の街に期待しないようにしたんだ
subtitles.english: Suffering time after time, I tried not to expect anything from my own town.

subtitles.original: そうやって守った孤独さえ めちゃくちゃになった
subtitles.english: Even the loneliness I protected that way was torn to pieces.

subtitles.original: あたしいつだって死にたくて仕方ない こんな顔だいじにしたいと思えないもん
subtitles.english: I've always wanted to die, I can't help it. I can't cherish a face like this.

subtitles.original: 共に過ごした日々が
subtitles.english: If the days we spent together,

subtitles.original: 細やかな幸せが かけがえのないトラウマになってたらいいな
subtitles.english: and our humble happiness, became an irreplaceable trauma, that would be nice.

subtitles.original: はなればなれなんて 誰かが吐かせたバグだよね
subtitles.english: Being separated is just a bug someone made us spit up, isn't it?

subtitles.original: あなたの一生の後悔として 添い遂げるよ
subtitles.english: I will stay with you forever as your lifelong regret.

subtitles.original: 大切なものってなに？ 今失くしたそれ...
subtitles.english: What is the most important thing? That thing you just lost.

subtitles.original: あたしと間違いを犯しちゃったんだ 取り返しがつかないね
subtitles.english: You made a mistake with me, and now it's irreversible.

subtitles.original: 健やかなるときも 病めるときも 黒い履歴の中で ずっといっしょ
subtitles.english: In sickness and in health, we'll be together forever inside our dark history.

subtitles.original: もうちょっと普通に 悲しいこと悲しいと思いたかった
subtitles.english: I wanted to feel sad about sad things in a slightly more normal way.

subtitles.original: 長調のチューンに 感情委託して楽になりたかった
subtitles.english: I wanted to outsource my feelings to a major-key tune to make things easier.

subtitles.original: せいぜい一生懸命に 生きてくださいね
subtitles.english: Please live your life as hard as you can.

subtitles.original: あたしいつだって死にたくて仕方ない あんな歌の言いなりになっていたくないの
subtitles.english: I've always wanted to die, I can't help it. I don't want to be at the beck and call of a song like that.

subtitles.original: あなただけひとりで あたしの目を盗んで 幸せになろうなんて思わないで
subtitles.english: Don't think you can sneak away and find happiness all by yourself.

subtitles.original: 髪を乾かしてくれた夜から あたしは壊されたんだよ
subtitles.english: Ever since the night you dried my hair, I've been broken.

subtitles.original: あなたの一生の後悔として 添い遂げるよ
subtitles.english: I will stay with you forever as your lifelong regret.

subtitles.original: 外れなくなってしまった指輪みたいに
subtitles.english: Like a ring that got stuck and won't come off,

subtitles.original: 何度もずっとフラッシュバックしている 裂いて痛いよ
subtitles.english: it keeps flashing back over and over. It hurts to be torn apart.

subtitles.original: 一緒に居た時の方が あたし可愛かったなぁ
subtitles.english: I was much cuter when we were together.

subtitles.original: あなたの一生の後悔として 添い遂げるよ
subtitles.english: I will stay with you forever as your lifelong regret.

subtitles.original: 大切なものってなに？ 今失くしたそれ...
subtitles.english: What is the most important thing? That thing you just lost.

subtitles.original: あたしと間違いを犯しちゃったんだ 取り返しがつかないね
subtitles.english: You made a mistake with me, and now it's irreversible.

subtitles.original: 健やかなるときも 病めるときも ほかの誰かと眠っていても お揃いの悪夢で ずっといっしょ
subtitles.english: In sickness and in health, even if you are sleeping with someone else, we'll be together forever in matching nightmares.

subtitles.original: 愛♡スクリーム！
subtitles.english: [On-Screen: Love Scream!]

subtitles.original: 教えて！もっと あなたの事
subtitles.english: Tell me! More about you!

subtitles.original: Tell me! もっもっもっもっ Tell me!
subtitles.english: Tell me! Mo-mo-mo-more, tell me!

subtitles.original: 聞かせて！もっと あなたの声
subtitles.english: Let me hear! More of your voice!

subtitles.original: Let me hear! もっもっもっもっ Let me hear!
subtitles.english: Let me hear! Mo-mo-mo-more, let me hear!

subtitles.original: こんなドキドキ もう抑えきれない
subtitles.english: I can't contain this throbbing heart anymore!

subtitles.original: All I need you, All I need you
subtitles.english: All I need is you, all I need is you!

subtitles.original: 友達は卒業 運命の私 見つけてほしいの
subtitles.english: No longer friends, I want you to find the 'me' of destiny.

subtitles.original: 1! 勇気を出して
subtitles.english: One! Gather up your courage!

subtitles.original: 2! 見つめる作戦
subtitles.english: Two! Operation: Staring at you!

subtitles.original: 3! 目と目が合えば
subtitles.english: Three! Once our eyes meet,

subtitles.original: 4! 止められない!
subtitles.english: Four! You can't stop it!

subtitles.original: Yeah! Yeah! Yeah! この恋 この愛で メルティ 溶けちゃうよ
subtitles.english: Yeah! Yeah! Yeah! With this love, this affection, I'll melt away!

subtitles.original: ねぇ？ ねえ、ねえ、ねえ、気づいて my darling 届け！ 大好き！
subtitles.english: Hey? Hey, hey, hey, notice me, my darling! Reach out! I love you!

subtitles.original: 愛！ スクリーム！ スクリーム！ 叫びましょう！
subtitles.english: Love! Scream! Scream! Let's shout it out!

subtitles.original: スクリーム！ アイスクリーム！
subtitles.english: Scream! Ice cream!

subtitles.original: 愛！ スクリーム！ スクリーム！ 叫びましょう！
subtitles.english: Love! Scream! Scream! Let's shout it out!

subtitles.original: スクリーム！ アイスクリーム！
subtitles.english: Scream! Ice cream!

subtitles.original: ルーナちゃん！ はい！ 何が好き？
subtitles.english: Luna-chan! Yes! What do you like?

subtitles.original: チョコミントよりも あなた！
subtitles.english: Even more than chocolate mint, I like you!

subtitles.original: わためちゃん！ はい！ 何が好き？
subtitles.english: Watame-chan! Yes! What do you like?

subtitles.original: ストロベリーフレーバーよりも あなた！
subtitles.english: Even more than strawberry flavor, I like you!

subtitles.original: おかゆちゃん！ はい！ 何が好き？
subtitles.english: Okayu-chan! Yes! What do you like?

subtitles.original: クッキー＆クリームよりも あなた！
subtitles.english: Even more than cookies and cream, I like you!

subtitles.original: みんな！ はい！ 何が好き？
subtitles.english: Everyone! Yes! What do you like?

subtitles.original: もちろん大好き アイスクリーム！
subtitles.english: Of course, I love ice cream!

subtitles.original: 止められない！
subtitles.english: I can't stop it!

subtitles.original: Yeah! Yeah! Yeah! この恋 この愛で メルティ 溶けちゃうよ
subtitles.english: Yeah! Yeah! Yeah! With this love, this affection, I'll melt away!

subtitles.original: ねぇ？ ねえ、ねえ、ねえ、気づいて my darling 届け！ 大好き！
subtitles.english: Hey? Hey, hey, hey, notice me, my darling! Reach out! I love you!

subtitles.original: 愛！ スクリーム！ スクリーム！ 叫びましょう！
subtitles.english: Love! Scream! Scream! Let's shout it out!

subtitles.original: スクリーム！ アイスクリーム！
subtitles.english: Scream! Ice cream!

subtitles.original: 愛！ スクリーム！ スクリーム！ 叫びましょう！
subtitles.english: Love! Scream! Scream! Let's shout it out!
